target.label: Prerequisite check (Docker runtime + Claude auth + gh auth) with pointer errors

recommendations.action: Accept WAIVED posture — 5 P2 ACs; Epic-2-ships-envelope-composes-upstream-external-services class story (TENTH Epic 2 delivery; FIRST instance of the multi-external-service-composition class — composes on Docker Desktop + Stories 2.8 Anthropic OAuth + Story 2.9 GitHub OAuth + Story 2.5 Docker named-volume + Epic 3 Story 3.7 halt-write consumer — five external-service / substrate dependencies orchestrated by one shared primitive); TWENTIETH cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent; TWENTY-FIRST ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED co-application pairing. Ground-(c) variant `external-service-owns-behavior-under-test` applied with multi-service composition (AC 1 Docker Desktop install + Docker Engine daemon-reachability; AC 2 Anthropic OAuth via Story 2.8 + Story 2.5 named-volume persistence; AC 3 GitHub OAuth via Story 2.9 + Story 2.5 named-volume persistence; AC 4 all-satisfied happy path composes all three; AC 5 composite fresh-fork + no-bypass posture).

Story 2.10 authors 2 NEW files (prereq-check.sh shared primitive + devbox-prereq-check.md authoritative doc) + 21 modified files per SC-11 17-shim-wire-in contract (15 block-swap + 2 prepend-only) + SC-17 read-only-on-prior-story-sections scope boundary. 30th manifest entry (`INV-devbox-prereq-check`) lands with sync-gate GREEN (contentHash `eb5b9db25e0afc77c4caf38c8bf60b37921a76df2ea030c91f66e848b0d8fe40`). Collateral `INV-prek-prepare-lifecycle` contentHash bumped (`d89072918e… → dc5ed31b8a…`) tracking the root `package.json` edit — whole-file content hash binds per Story 1.9 semantic; this discipline is the novel discovery of iter-248 and forecast-applicable to Stories 2.11..2.17 + Epic 3+ stories that add pnpm verbs.

Per-AC live fresh-fork first-run verification unlocks at M4-Pro operator workstation backend-A: AC 1 Docker-missing install-URL requires live Docker Desktop absent state + host browser to reach install page; AC 2 Claude-missing pointer requires live Anthropic OAuth + `keel_home_dev` empty state (pre-`pnpm claude`); AC 3 gh-missing pointer requires live GitHub OAuth + `keel_home_dev` empty state (pre-`pnpm gh:auth`); AC 4 all-satisfied silent pass requires both tokens + Ralph TUI attach (Epic 3 scope for full TUI semantics; currently reduces to docker attach PID 1 sleep under Story 2.1 substrate); AC 5 composite fresh-fork walkthrough requires full fresh-machine state + sequential operator fix loop (install Docker → `pnpm devbox:start` → `pnpm claude` → `pnpm gh:auth` → `pnpm ralph:build`). No Story 2.10 code change required at any live-flow verification point — prereq-check.sh is stateless; Docker Desktop + upstream Claude Code CLI + upstream gh CLI + Stories 2.5/2.8/2.9 substrate + Epic 3 Story 3.7 consumer own all five behaviors. Iteration-env-safe smokes ALL 9 PASSED at iter-248 using workspace-based `.ralph-smoke/shim/` stub-docker harness per iter-223/230/237 LESSON (NOT `/tmp/` tmpfs noexec).
Run /bmad-testarch-test-review to assess test quality (no tests exist — no-op; recorded for parity with downstream pipelines).
